cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(sentinel_engine LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# ─── Dependency paths ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

set(DEPS_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/deps")
set(ORT_DIR  "${DEPS_DIR}/onnxruntime")
set(JSON_DIR "${DEPS_DIR}/json")

# ─── ONNX Runtime ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Headers
include_directories("${ORT_DIR}/include")

# Import library (MinGW .a generated by setup_cpp_deps.py)
if(MINGW)
    set(ORT_LIB "${ORT_DIR}/lib/libonnxruntime.a")
else()
    set(ORT_LIB "${ORT_DIR}/lib/onnxruntime.lib")
endif()

if(NOT EXISTS "${ORT_LIB}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "ONNX Runtime lib not found: ${ORT_LIB}\nRun: python setup_cpp_deps.py")
endif()

# ─── nlohmann/json ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

include_directories("${JSON_DIR}")

if(NOT EXISTS "${JSON_DIR}/nlohmann/json.hpp")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "nlohmann/json not found: ${JSON_DIR}/nlohmann/json.hpp\nRun: python setup_cpp_deps.py")
endif()

# ─── Source files ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

include_directories("${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src")

add_executable(sentinel_engine
    src/main.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(sentinel_engine PRIVATE "${ORT_LIB}")

# ─── Compiler flags ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

if(MINGW OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
    target_compile_options(sentinel_engine PRIVATE -O2 -Wall -Wextra)
    # Link against the ORT DLL at runtime; ensure it's on PATH
    target_link_options(sentinel_engine PRIVATE -Wl,--allow-multiple-definition)
elseif(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(sentinel_engine PRIVATE /O2 /W3 /wd4251)
endif()

# ─── Post-build: copy ORT DLL next to executable ──────────────────────────────

if(WIN32)
    set(ORT_DLL "${ORT_DIR}/lib/onnxruntime.dll")
    if(EXISTS "${ORT_DLL}")
        add_custom_command(TARGET sentinel_engine POST_BUILD
            COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
                "${ORT_DLL}"
                "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:sentinel_engine>/onnxruntime.dll"
            COMMENT "Copying onnxruntime.dll to build directory"
        )
    endif()
endif()

# ─── Install ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

install(TARGETS sentinel_engine DESTINATION bin)
if(WIN32 AND EXISTS "${ORT_DIR}/lib/onnxruntime.dll")
    install(FILES "${ORT_DIR}/lib/onnxruntime.dll" DESTINATION bin)
endif()

message(STATUS "")
message(STATUS "sentinel_engine configuration:")
message(STATUS "  Build type: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")
message(STATUS "  ORT dir:    ${ORT_DIR}")
message(STATUS "  JSON dir:   ${JSON_DIR}")
message(STATUS "")
